title: pinus arizonica var. ornelasii
intro: Pinus arizonica var. ornelasii, also known as the Ornelas' Arizona pine, is a variety of pine tree native to the southwestern United States. The resin of this plant has been used in traditional medicine, particularly for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Pinus arizonica var. ornelasii include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and combat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and pneumonia. Pinus arizonica var. ornelasii is often prepared into herbal tinctures, salves, and essential oils for topical application and internal consumption.
